title: bertiera pomatium
intro: Bertiera pomatium, also known as the 'sneezeweed', is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily for its expectorant and diaphoretic effects. The leaves and roots of Bertiera pomatium have been used to treat various ailments, including bronchitis, colds, and fever, due to their ability to stimulate sweating and relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Bertiera pomatium is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory infections.
